name: In West Valley City, how's fault decided in machine work accidents?
description: Comp no-fault; suits need proof of negligence/defect.

mainEntity.name: In West Valley City, how's fault decided in machine work accidents?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp no-fault; suits need proof of negligence/defect.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers comp ignores fault; benefits automatic if work-related.[1][4] For third-party suits, investigate maintenance, training, defects.[7] Key factors: Expert analysis of machine; witness accounts; OSHA logs. Utah courts use negligence standards for suits.
